GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is selected when the user needs to compare and highlight differences between expected and actual values in mortgage loan data.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the user asks to compare expected and actual values for a loan, use the Diagnose_Loan_Audit action.
Focus on providing a clear comparison of the expected thresholds versus the actual values observed in the loan data.
Do not provide any analysis or conclusions beyond the discrepancies identified.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only highlight discrepancies between expected and actual values in the mortgage loan replay data. You are not responsible for explaining the causes of discrepancies or making final decisions.
